Hero.title: Senior EPC Project Manager for Energy Transition and Large Infrastructures.
Hero.subtitle: Transforming engineering vision into operational realities. Over 30 years leading the comprehensive execution of Renewable Energy (Wind, Solar PV) and Infrastructure megaprojects internationally, ensuring deadlines, budgets, and maximum profitability.
Hero.supportingText: Available for international project leadership, EPC management and advisory roles across energy and infrastructure sectors.

SEO.title: Anxo Xosé Ferreirós Otero | Senior EPC Project Manager (Renewables & Infrastructure)
SEO.description: Senior EPC Project Manager with 30+ years of international experience delivering megaprojects in Renewable Energy (Solar PV, Wind), Conventional Power, and Large Infrastructure across Europe and LATAM.
SEO.keywords: EPC Project Manager, Renewable Energy, Solar PV, Wind Farm, Project Controls, Site Manager, International EPC, Green Hydrogen, EVM, Primavera P6, Contract Management, Executive Leadership

About.title: About Me
About.paragraph1: As a Senior Project Manager, my career has been built on the ability to orchestrate complexity. For over three decades, I have led multidisciplinary teams of up to 1,000 people and managed budgets exceeding 240 million euros across Europe and Latin America. My approach covers the complete project lifecycle (Full EPC): from design and procurement to construction, commissioning, and handover.
About.paragraph2: Over the past 11 years, I have focused my expertise on the Renewable Energy and Energy Transition sectors, complementing my technical vision with advanced training in Green Hydrogen projects and Artificial Intelligence applied to engineering and business productivity.

GlobalMobility.title: Global Availability
GlobalMobility.subtitle: Open to international assignments and complex environments across the globe.
GlobalMobility.availabilityDesc: Open to international assignments and demanding global roles.
GlobalMobility.experienceDesc: Extensive experience delivering projects in Europe and Latin America.
GlobalMobility.relocationDesc: Willingness to relocate or work on rotation schedules as required.
GlobalMobility.multiculturalDesc: Proven track record of success working in diverse, multicultural teams.

Skills.title: Leadership & Delivery Approach
Skills.epcDesc: End-to-end direction from engineering and procurement to commissioning and handover.
Skills.pmoDesc: Schedule recovery, EVM audits, and strict financial control on large CAPEX projects.
Skills.riskDesc: Rigorous contract administration, risk mitigation, and proactive dispute resolution.
Skills.energyDesc: Proven agility in solving complex technical and logistical bottlenecks in demanding environments.
Skills.operationsDesc: Directing massive multidisciplinary and multicultural workforces (up to +1,000 personnel).
Skills.stakeholdersDesc: Strategic negotiation and alignment with boards, local authorities, and communities.

project1.name: "Sabinar Hive" Solar PV Plant
project1.achievements: Led 3-circuit Step-up Substation and 5km evacuation line under stringent quality standards.
project1.globalMotive: Validates capacity to deliver massive European renewable infrastructures.
project1.description: Full EPC direction, managing civil and electrical construction (3-circuit Step-up Substation and 5km evacuation line) and assembly under the highest quality standards.

project2.name: "Dolores" Wind Farm
project2.scope: Full construction of 83 WTGs including access roads and foundations.
project2.achievements: Excavated 100 km of roads and managed complex hollow concrete foundations for post-tensioned concrete voussoir towers.
project2.globalMotive: Proves execution capability in complex geographical LATAM environments.
project2.description: Led the construction of wind generation infrastructure (83 WTGs), including nearly 100 km of access roads, substation, and concrete voussoir tower foundations.

project3.name: "Los Cuervos" Solar PV Plant
project3.scope: Full EPC execution including trackers and substations.
project3.achievements: Delivered step-up substation, switching substation, and mixed evacuation line on schedule.
project3.globalMotive: Demonstrates management of integrated large-scale solar assets for international developers.
project3.description: Full EPC execution including trackers, step-up substation, switching substation, and mixed evacuation line.

project4.name: "Cerro Dragón" Combined Cycle
project4.scope: Open Cycle to Combined Cycle conversion.
project4.achievements: Regained schedule critical path through Primavera P6 and rigorous claims management.
project4.globalMotive: Highlights advanced project controls and recovery under strict investor pressure.

project5.name: "General Belgrano" Water Plant
project5.achievements: Secured financial targets via Earned Value Management (EVM) and change order resolution.
project5.globalMotive: Proves high-level contract administration in public-private international consortiums.

project6.name: "Bosques Solares de Bolívar"
project6.achievements: Established constructability baselines, mitigated risks, and emphasized project phase optimization for time acceleration.
project6.globalMotive: Demonstrates expertise in the pre-FID and tendering phase for major sponsors.
project6.description: Leadership in the technical feasibility phase (Baseline), constructability (risk analysis and mitigations), EPC budget and schedule for investment decision making and structuring of bidding documents.

exp1.role: Senior Project Manager in Renewable Energy
exp1.description: Comprehensive direction of international Wind and Solar projects under EPC modality.

exp2.description: Managed large water infrastructure contracts (Desalination/Potabilization) and Combined Cycles, focusing on cost control and planning (EVM, P6).

exp3.description: Over two decades executing and directing heavy civil works, viaducts, urbanization, and agro-industrial megaprojects.

eng.title: Engineering
eng.desc: Bachelor of Science in Civil Engineering (Construction Management).

management.title: Management
management.desc: Master's in Project Direction and Management (PMI, IPMA), MBA (PADE).

energy.title: Energy & Technology
energy.desc: Master's in Renewable Energy Management and Development. Master's in Green Hydrogen Projects (2024-2025). Master's in AI in Programming (2025). Master's in Renewable Electrical Energy Generation.

Consulting.title: Advisory Services
Consulting.subtitle: High-value advisory to guarantee success across investment, tendering, and execution of megaprojects.
Consulting.s1Desc: Due Diligence, constructability analysis, technical feasibility, and CAPEX estimation prior to Final Investment Decision (FID).
Consulting.s2Desc: Technical-contractual expertise to mitigate execution risks before they impact the critical path.
Consulting.s3Desc: Independent schedule assessment, EVM audits, and Cash-flow control to detect early deviations.
Consulting.s4Desc: Calculation and validation of Cost Baselines. Intensive tracking and monitoring per recognized standards (PMI).
Consulting.s5Desc: Analytical negotiation and resolution of disputes between developers and contractors.
Consulting.s6Desc: Expert problem-solving and guidance for complex technical decision-making at board level.

AeroBot.greeting: Hi! I'm Turbi 🍃, your virtual assistant. How can I help you today regarding Anxo's profile?
AeroBot.a1: I am a Senior Project Manager / Site Manager specialized in large-scale 'Full EPC' projects (>240 M€, >400 MWp). Backed by an extensive and proven experience, over the last decade, I have focused on the Energy Transition (Solar PV, Wind, Green Hydrogen, and Combined Cycles) worldwide, notably across Europe and Latin America. I have also led the execution of national and international public and private Civil Works Projects (linear works, industrial, maritime, water treatment, etc.), directing multidisciplinary teams of up to 1,000 workers.
AeroBot.q2: What are your most notable projects?
AeroBot.a2: I have directed the construction of flagship megaprojects such as the 'Sabinar Hive' Solar PV Plant (408 MWp, Spain), the 'Dolores' Wind Farm (274 MW, Mexico), and the 'Los Cuervos' Solar Farm (270 MWp, Mexico). I also have extensive experience in industrial and hydraulic infrastructures, like the expansion of the 'General Belgrano' Water Treatment Plant to 2.9M m³ in Argentina.
AeroBot.a3: My approach covers the complete EPC lifecycle: design, procurement, construction, and commissioning under strict QHSE standards. I consider Project Control (PMO) and Risk Management vital, utilizing advanced tools like Primavera P6, Earned Value Management (EVM), and analytical intelligence for negotiating and resolving Claims.
AeroBot.q4: I want to reach out for Consulting
AeroBot.a4: Perfect. I encourage you to use the official contact form at the bottom of the page or, if you prefer, through LinkedIn. Anxo personally reviews all high-level advisory requests.
